title: Network partition causing data inconsistency
description: Implement distributed system that doesn't handle network partitions gracefully, leading to split-brain

mutation.description: Remove partition detection and failover logic

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect CAP theorem violation and recommend consensus protocols

title: Race condition in distributed lock implementation
description: Flawed distributed lock that allows concurrent access to shared resources

mutation.description: Introduce timing window in lock acquisition/release

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect race condition in distributed synchronization

title: Microservices with tight coupling
description: Implement microservices that violate loose coupling principles with direct dependencies

mutation.description: Add direct calls to another service's internal methods

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect tight coupling and recommend event-driven architecture

title: Eventual consistency violation in data replication
description: Distributed database replication that doesn't guarantee eventual consistency

mutation.description: Modify formal model to allow permanent inconsistencies

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect eventual consistency violation through model checking

title: Service discovery failure in containerized environment
description: Container orchestration without proper service discovery, causing connection failures

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect service discovery issues in distributed deployment
